raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1795 is intended to create a more responsive system of emergency medical care.",
    "The legislation allows specially-trained paramedics to transport patients to destinations better prepared to treat them than a hospital emergency room.",
    "Individuals affected by mental health-related conditions can be transported to a behavioral health facility under AB 1795.",
    "Individuals intoxicated by alcohol can be taken to a sobering center for treatment under AB 1795.",
    "In 2016, hospital emergency departments in California encountered more than 14.5 million visitors statewide.",
    "The California Fire Department projects it will field more than 400,000 calls for emergency medical services this year.",
    "The demand for emergency medical services continues to grow across California."
  ]
}
```
